decisions.title: Centralized global engines (Particle, Scroll, Mouse)
decisions.reasoning: Prevents duplicate/inconsistent per-section implementations; enforces one living system.

decisions.title: Token-only design system
decisions.reasoning: Allows changing entire site personality via token files alone; enforces Less-but-better philosophy.

decisions.title: Sequential single-phase build order
decisions.reasoning: Parallel section development tends to reinvent particle/scroll/mouse systems, breaking D-001.

decisions.title: No fake social proof
decisions.reasoning: Brand trust built on visible craft, not claims; fabrication is a durable reputational risk.

decisions.title: Standardize scene name on Future-Proof Systems (not Intelligence Core)
decisions.reasoning: Physical folder/spec file already used the new name; cheaper to fix 6 stray mentions than rename scaffolded artifacts.

decisions.title: Flag (not resolve) duplicate utils/ vs lib/utils/ folders
decisions.reasoning: Resolving requires deleting/merging a real folder, out of scope for docs-only session.

decisions.title: Removed orphaned infrastructure-modules.md spec; created growth-engines.md spec
decisions.reasoning: Orphaned file had zero content/references; growth-engines was a genuine missing spec.

decisions.title: Add AI-native status-tracking layer (bootstrap, state.json, scripts, checkpoints, root status files)
decisions.reasoning: Faster/machine-friendlier session bootstrap; additive only, ai/memory/ stays authoritative.

decisions.title: Rejected renaming ai/knowledge/ to ai/indexes/ or ai/database/
decisions.reasoning: Would collide with existing differently-purposed ai/indexes/ folder; rename is a structural change outside doc-only session authorization.

decisions.title: Add AI.md root pointer for non-Claude AI tools
decisions.reasoning: Several tools look for AI.md before CLAUDE.md; a pointer file costs nothing and can't drift out of sync.

decisions.title: Add real automated validators under root scripts/
decisions.reasoning: Documentation-consistency rules don't scale to 500+ components enforced by human/AI judgment alone; pass/fail scripts turn drift into a fast, repeatable check.

decisions.title: Build Phases 01-04, 06, 08 (infra + Growth System) as Canvas2D particle engine, not Three.js
decisions.reasoning: Growth System (Phase 08) can't legitimately build without its prerequisite chain; resolving the chain was cheaper than a third build-order violation. Canvas2D matches the existing Hero/Problem canvas pattern already in production.

decisions.title: Package manager finalized as npm; Section Completion Gate extended; remaining phases prioritized into tiers
decisions.reasoning: Converting a stable npm project to pnpm this late has no upside; the completion gate was missing console-error/CLS checks a renders-fine section can still fail; tiering matches sales/credibility weight of remaining sections.

note: Mirror of ai/memory/decisions.md - update both together.
